A NEWPRESS ORIGINAL
Q3 2026

The Human
Element

WITH JOHNNY HARRIS
7.5M SUBSCRIBERS 12 EPISODES
SEASON 1

Global Stories, Human Lens. A premium documentary series modernizing ambitious, on-the-ground reporting for the YouTube era.

NEWPRESS THE HUMAN ELEMENT Scroll
SECTION 01

The Mission

Nourishing journalism
in an era of noise

While legacy media retreats from ambitious on-the-ground reporting, Johnny and his media company Newpress are leaning in. The Human Element is a premium, repeatable show format that bridges the gap between high-context explainer journalism and deeply emotional, character-driven storytelling. At a time when the internet is flooded with synthetic content and polarizing noise, The Human Element offers nourishing journalism—content that makes the viewer feel smarter, more connected, and more human.

On Location
SECTION 02

The Anchor

Johnny Harris

Hosted by Johnny Harris—acting as a proxy for the viewer. Curious, humble, and rigorous, he travels the world to ask big questions and find real answers by meeting characters along the way.

7.5M+
Subscribers
12
Episodes · Season 1
30–40
Minute Runtime
SECTION 03

The Format

Built for the platform

Season 1 launches in 2026 with 12 episodes—a standardized, repeatable show format blending cinematic on-the-ground reporting, high-end explanatory animation, and behind-the-curtain transparency.

Cinematic Reporting

High-fidelity, on-the-ground documentary filmmaking from locations around the world.

Explanatory Animation

High-end motion graphics that make complex geopolitical and scientific topics accessible.

Multi-Format Flywheel

Deep integration with YouTube Shorts for storytelling nuggets and Community for real-time reporting updates.

Transparent Process

Behind-the-curtain moments that build trust and pull the audience into the journalistic process.

Production
SECTION 04

Validated

The format works

A version of the format has been tested and validated on Johnny's channel already, earning millions of views per episode.

Inside the Most Prepared Country on Earth

52:30 4.5M Views

Why Saudi Arabia is Building a $1 Trillion City in the Desert

34:17 6.9M Views

Why Switzerland Has 374,142 Bunkers

29:22 9.3M Views
Global
SECTION 05

Season 1

Pilot episodes in development

Palau

When the Ocean Turns Against You

This episode examines how the citizens of Palau are navigating the immediate, physical effects of ocean acidification and rising sea levels. It moves past the theoretical debate of climate change to show how a coastal society is forced to re-engineer its food systems and traditional way of life as the surrounding environment becomes increasingly unstable.

Nepal

The Roads That Change Everything

This episode explores the impact of rapid road construction in the remote provinces in the Himalayan range—a region caught in a geopolitical squeeze between India and China. We follow the local apple farmers and transporters whose livelihoods have been transformed by new market access, while simultaneously being threatened by the landslides and environmental instability caused.

Q3 2026

Launching with a splash

To match the scale and ambition of The Human Element, we intend to treat the Q3 launch as a major media event—an invitation-only premiere at a flagship venue in New York City, bridging the gap between the creator economy and the global press.

The Screening

A cinematic presentation of the flagship episode on the big screen to showcase the high-fidelity production and visual rigor.

The Salon

Johnny hosts a high-level Q&A and moderated panel featuring world-class experts and the real-world subjects of the film.

The Network

A curated evening bringing together brand partners, legacy journalists, and top-tier creators to discuss the future of media.

SECTION 07

Partnerships

The smartest room
on the internet

Blue Chip partners tired of the unpredictability of the influencer world and the declining reach of linear TV. The Human Element provides a prestige environment for brands that value global citizenship or who want to project intellectual authority—brands who want to be associated with the smartest room on the internet.

Sustainability Global Logistics Technology Global Connectivity Education Travel
Newpress · 2026 The Human Element
